title: D@`uw'el #1845
definition:
Deuel = "they know God"

 1) father of Eliasaph, the captain of the tribe of Gad at the time of
    the numbering of the people at Sinai, also called 'Reuel'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Deuel = "they know God"

 1) father of Eliasaph, the captain of the tribe of Gad at the time of
    the numbering of the people at Sinai, also called 'Reuel'

    NASB:  known of God, a Gadite
